CustomField.description: Determines how the filter conditions within this Grid Criteria are combined. • AND – all conditions must be true • OR – at least one condition must be true • Custom Logic – use a custom expression to define how conditions interact. Example: '1 AND (2 OR 3)'
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use AND if products must match all conditions. Use OR if products only need to match at least one condition. Use Custom Logic to combine conditions using a formula such as 1 AND (2 OR 3).
CustomField.label: Filter Logic
